description: For natively_callable fns: entry block_params take the typed sig params directly (no frame_ptr load); emit_return uses native return_(&[val]) with kind-aware tag/unbox. For uniform fns: existing path unchanged. Call sites still use the uniform fz_alloc_frame path (callers haven't migrated yet) — so this commit is only safe if natively_callable is gated to empty until .6.2.4.
title: VR.4.2.3: bifurcated compile_fn entry block + emit_return
